name: Datto
description: Backup, disaster recovery, and business continuity platform. Monitor backup status.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to the Datto Partner Portal
2. Navigate to Integrations > API Keys
3. Generate a new API key pair
4. Copy the Public Key and Secret Key below

checks.name: Datto App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Datto API is accessible.
